title: Gnosos
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Gnosos |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Sunesi]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin=[[Color/Legends|Turquoise]] with silvery brow ridges |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[CorDuro Shipping]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|My name is Gnosos, though I don't expect you to remember that. More important, I have a gift.''"
"''And this is—?''"
"''It contains my voiceporint, which will key a hoverpod in slip thirty, in the second-floor garage. I think it likely you will need to leave Vice-Director Brarun's hospitality in a hurry.|Gnosos and Jacen Solo|}} '''Gnosos''' was a male [[Sunesi]] who worked as a [[CorDuro Shipping]] steward on [[Bburru Station]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]].''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' to [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]. He did not support the company when they decided to turn [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] over to the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. He helped [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] escape imprisonment by [[Durgard Brarun]] by providing him with a [[Datacard/Legends|datacard]] with clearance to access [[Port Duggan]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Gnosos |es=Gnosos }} [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Servants]] [[Category:Sunesi]]
